code:
proof fn phi_1_spec_index2va_bitand_not_bitor(l4a: L4Index, l4b: L4Index)
    requires

        l4a != l4b,
    ensures
        spec_index2va((l4a, 0, 0, 0)) == spec_index2va((l4b, 0, 0, 0)),
{

reason: spec_index2va uses `&` (bitwise AND) instead of `|` (bitwise OR) to combine shifted fields — distinct index tuples collapse to the same VA (likely 0)
